title: Wouldn't It Be Nice
why_this_song: Wouldn't It Be Nice by The Beach Boys (1966) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 8 times; first heard in: "Wouldn't it be nice if we were older?"
Appears 6 times; first heard in: "Wouldn't it be nice if we were older?"
Appears 5 times; first heard in: "Baby, then there wouldn't be a single thing we couldn't do"
Appears 4 times; first heard in: "And wouldn't it be nice to live together"
Appears 3 times; first heard in: "Hold each other close the whole night through?"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: Maybe if we think and wish and hope and pray
It might come true (run, run with you)
Baby, then there wouldn't be a single thing we couldn't do

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "wouldn't" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "wouldn't" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "nice" in the whole song?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Wouldn't it be nice if we were older?
And after having spent the day together
We could be married (we could be married)

exercises.prompt_en: If you had to summarize "Wouldn't It Be Nice" in one sentence to someone who has never heard it, what would you say?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você tivesse que resumir "Wouldn't It Be Nice" em uma frase para alguém que nunca ouviu, o que diria?

exercises.prompt_en: What kind of person do you imagine the narrator of "Wouldn't It Be Nice" is? Describe their age, mood, and situation using at least three details from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: Que tipo de pessoa você imagina ser o narrador de "Wouldn't It Be Nice"? Descreva a idade, o humor e a situação usando pelo menos três detalhes da letra.

exercises.prompt_en: If you could ask The Beach Boys one question about "Wouldn't It Be Nice", what would it be and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse perguntar uma coisa para The Beach Boys sobre "Wouldn't It Be Nice", o que seria e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
